calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order Authorizing Particular Transactions; To Transfer Community Property To Community Spouse; And To Execute An Occupancy Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Leonore Gerard for and with Helen Castellanos (Petitioner).

The Court approved the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
